[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [fonts](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeTileset](../../TextmodeTileset.md) / dispose

# Method: dispose()

```ts
dispose(): void;
```

Dispose the tileset and release its shared atlas resources.

## Returns

`void`
